concepts.title: Number fields and rings of integers
concepts.blurb: Finite extensions of Q carry arithmetic via algebraic integers.

concepts.title: Discriminant of a number field
concepts.blurb: The discriminant $\Delta_K$ is the squared determinant of an integral basis under the embeddings; it records exactly which rational primes ramify.

concepts.title: Ideal factorization and ramification
concepts.blurb: Dedekind domains restore unique factorization at ideal level and track ramification.

concepts.title: Minkowski bound and geometry of numbers
concepts.blurb: Every ideal class has a representative of norm at most $M_K=(4/\pi)^{r_2}(n!/n^n)\sqrt{|\Delta_K|}$, via Minkowski's convex-body theorem; this is what forces the class group to be finite.

concepts.title: Class group and units
concepts.blurb: Class group and unit rank measure arithmetic failure and structure.
